# ProgressTracker.Register method

Registers *token* as active when a request carrying it is about to be sent. Mirrors TS `register`.

```csharp
public void Register(ProgressToken token)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| token | The progress token. |

## Exceptions

| exception | condition |
| --- | --- |
| InvalidOperationException | Thrown when the token is already active (R-15.1.1-c). |
